description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent hip roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are clad in a dark material, accented by a lighter trim around the base and windows, giving it a modern yet understated appearance. Large rectangular windows are distributed along the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The entry door is positioned slightly off-center on the front facade, framed by a small overhang. The structural frame, visible in some views, is composed of a steel or metal skeleton, indicating robust construction. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, large windows, and a sturdy metal frame, accented by light trim.
description_view_0: This view shows the bungalow's metal structural frame on the left and the finished exterior with a hip roof and front door on the right.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, highlighting the main entrance, large windows, and the full expanse of the hip roof.
description_view_2: The side of the bungalow is shown, with the hip roof sloping down and the metal frame structure visible on the right.
description_view_3: The rear of the bungalow is visible, showing the back wall, additional windows, and the metal frame structure in front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
